title: Diff-related type definitions for document tracking and comparison
purpose: Defines TypeScript interfaces for managing document diff states, history tracking, and patch notifications in the UI.
module_context: Exports three interfaces: DiffState for tracking diff visibility and content, DocumentHistory for managing document revision history, and PatchNotification for communicating patch application details.

steps.content: Define structure for tracking whether a diff is shown.
Specify the old content that is being compared.
Specify the new content that is being compared.
Define structure for tracking previous document content.
Indicate whether there is a difference between previous and current content.
Define structure for patch notification type identifier.
Specify the document identifier for which the patch applies.
Record the old content before patch application.
Record the new content after patch application.
Include detailed patch information showing old and new strings.
